goals.conclusion: IsGraph (forall a : A, B a)
IsGraph (forall a : A, B a)
(forall a : A, B a) -> (forall a : A, B a) -> Type

contents: intros x y; exact (forall (a : A), x a $-> y a).

goals.conclusion: Is01Cat (forall a : A, B a)
Is01Cat (forall a : A, B a)
forall a : forall a : A, B a, a $-> a

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b c : forall a0 : A, B a0),
(b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c
forall a : forall a : A, B a, a $-> a

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b c : forall a0 : A, B a0),
(b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c

contents: intros x y z f g a; exact (f a $o g a).

Instance is0gpd_forall (A : Type) (B : A -> Type)
  (* Apparently when there's a [forall] there, Coq can't automatically add the [Is01Cat] instance from the [Is0Gpd] instance. *)
  `{forall a, IsGraph (B a)} `{forall a, Is01Cat (B a)} `{forall a, Is0Gpd (B a)}
  : Is0Gpd (forall a, B a).

goals.conclusion: Is0Gpd (forall a : A, B a)
Is0Gpd (forall a : A, B a)

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b : forall a0 : A, B a0),
(a $-> b) -> b $-> a

contents: intros f g p a; exact ((p a)^$).

goals.conclusion: Is2Graph (forall a : A, B a)
Is2Graph (forall a : A, B a)

contents: intros f g; exact (forall a, f a $-> g a).

Is1Cat (forall a : A, B a)

(g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)

(f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

(f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

(f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f

(f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b c : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)

contents: intros x y z h; srapply Build_Is0Functor.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : x $-> y, (a $-> b) -> cat_postcomp x h a $-> cat_postcomp x h b
cat_postcomp x h f a $-> cat_postcomp x h g a

(f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

contents: intros x y z h; srapply Build_Is0Functor.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : y $-> z, (a $-> b) -> cat_precomp z h a $-> cat_precomp z h b
cat_precomp z h f a $-> cat_precomp z h g a

forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b c d : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

contents: intros w x y z f g h a; apply cat_assoc.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b c d : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f

contents: intros w x y z f g h a; apply cat_assoc_opp.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f

contents: intros x y f a; apply cat_idl.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a : forall a : A, B a) (b : forall a0 : A, B a0) 
(f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f

contents: intros x y f a; apply cat_idr.
